title: Plushified
description:
Minecraft plushie mod with characters from LifeSteal SMP, Dream SMP, Content SMP, Hermitcraft, MineShield and Mineshield Academy.

I'm too tired to actually write smthing to get your attention soooo-

There are 180 of them?? Idk
body:
![Plushified mod banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4f53870f5dcdb5125a25793fa93a051868a65144.jpeg)
### Plushified! Collect them all?

## Yeah
This mod is still early in development, butttt, who cares? Nobody. I should just go to sleep, I'm not the one to do this kind of stuff.

Btf, the project is open sourced soooooo if you want do add something, feel free to do it via [github](https://github.com/AlexNompe/plushified).

## About the mod 
Oh and yes, this mod is about plushies, like, about an incredibly large amount of them. ~~40~~ ~~145~~ 180 at the moment.

Plushies are the new obtainable decoration block with a special sound effect upon clicking on them _(cute little squeak :3)_. If you want, you can collect a lot of them and create an entire room of little buddies, idk.

Ahhh, and yes, the plushies can be obtained via looting structures, fishing, archeology, recieving a gift from your cat, getting a trial chambers loot and a few more things I just forgor.

## Who's plushies are there?
As there are already a lot of plushies, I cannot tell you everything about all of them. Just be aware that their list contains these people (not everyone from the categories down below were included, not because I don't like those people, I just forgot to add them, pleeease let me know if I've missed anybody):
- My friends
- Maybe random content creators
- Content SMP players
- Dream SMP players
- Lifesteal SMP players
- Hermitcraft players
- Mineshield players
- Mineshield academy players

## Who are some of these communities?
Hear me out. If you don't know some of the players that you'll come across in the game, that's pretty much normal. Some of the communities are local to the place that I've lived in before, soooo you don't need to worry about them, they're still just the same old and loved characters with unique designs and cute faces :>

<details>
<summary>How loot works and the chance for getting a plushie</summary>

The mod doesn't change vanilla loot from any of those sources, it just injects a new roll for every plushie that's in the mod with 0.5% chance of appearing! (despite such a small chance, that's like, for EACH one of them, meaning, that the chance of getting a plushie is actually higher (however the chance does not add up to _180 * 0.5%_ for any plushie, I've tested that))

</details>

_Also now the mod has a YACL config file, where you can choose what plushies are loaded when minecraft starts, as well as what loot tables they appear in._
